tools.name: content_getPost
tools.title: Get a single post
tools.description: Returns a post by id, including its current score.

tools.name: content_listCommunityFeed
tools.title: List a community feed
tools.description: Returns the most recent posts in a community, newest first, with a read consistency envelope.

tools.name: gateway_getDonation
tools.title: Get a single donation (proxied)
tools.description: Returns a donation by id within a community, via donations-service.

tools.name: gateway_getPost
tools.title: Get a single post (proxied)
tools.description: Returns a post by id via content-service.

tools.name: gateway_listCommunityFeed
tools.title: List a community feed (proxied)
tools.description: Returns the most recent posts in a community, newest first, via content-service.

tools.name: gateway_listDonations
tools.title: List a community’s donations (proxied)
tools.description: Returns the most recent donations in a community, newest first, via donations-service.

tools.name: gateway_listEvents
tools.title: Poll community events (WebSocket fallback)
tools.description: Returns the push envelopes for a community after the given seq cursor — the polling fallback for the WebSocket stream (Commitment 11). Every event delivered over WS is also returned here.

tools.name: gateway_listFlags
tools.title: List all flags for a community (proxied)
tools.description: Returns every flag resolved for the community, with a read envelope, via flags-service.

tools.name: gateway_resolveFlag
tools.title: Resolve a feature flag (proxied to flags-service)
tools.description: Returns the flag’s current rollout state and gating boolean, with a read envelope.

tools.name: qaroom_conventionsCheck
tools.title: Check a snippet against enforced conventions
tools.description: Runs eslint-plugin-qaroom over a snippet and returns a typed verdict — callable before writing code so an agent can self-check determinism/test-shape rules.

code.description: The TypeScript source snippet to check (≤100k chars).

filename.description: Path the snippet would live at; selects file-scoped conventions (e.g. *.test.ts).

rules.description: Optional subset of rule ids; omit to run the snippet-checkable default set.

resources.name: content system state
resources.description: Observable state of content-service (post/vote counts) with an as_of envelope.

resources.name: gateway system state
resources.description: Observable state of the gateway with an as_of envelope.

resources.name: gateway rate-limit usage
resources.description: The calling principal's current rate-limit usage and time to full refill.

resources.name: test-results summary
resources.description: The frozen test-results/summary.json envelope, validated against its schema.
